scope: Re-run the anchored 180-domain frontier tranche under the deeper harness and save the resulting breadth checkpoint

decision_context.prior_state: The anchored 180-domain frontier tranche from March 24, 2026 proved that broader frontier slices were tractable, but the medium harness weakened the top line and collapsed the benchmark median back to zero.
decision_context.decision: Keep the same anchored 180-domain tranche and rerun it with the deeper harness instead of changing the tranche selection or retuning conversion logic.
decision_context.why_now: This is the cleanest way to test whether broader frontier quality survives once the harness is deep enough.

files_expected.purpose: Deeper bounded hybrid spec for the anchored 180-domain frontier tranche.
Saved deeper hybrid run for the anchored 180-domain frontier tranche.
Diagnostic brief for the deeper anchored 180-domain run.
Ranked readout for the deeper anchored 180-domain checkpoint.
Operator-facing markdown export for the deeper anchored 180-domain checkpoint.
Documents why the deeper 180 exists and how it compares to the existing checkpoints.

planned_steps: Build the deeper hybrid spec from the existing anchored 180-domain tranche
Run the deeper hybrid evaluation and save the diagnostic
Generate a ranked readout and markdown export for comparison against the medium 180 and deeper 90 checkpoints

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m pytest tests/test_mirofish_hybrid.py tests/test_mirofish_discovery.py tests/test_mirofish_portfolio.py tests/test_trend_prediction.py -q

$env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-frontier-export --input research/meta/MIROFISH_FRONTIER_READOUT_TRANCHE_180_DEEPER_2026-03-25.json --output research/meta/MIROFISH_FRONTIER_EXPORT_TRANCHE_180_DEEPER_2026-03-25.md --title "MiroFish Frontier Tranche 180 Deeper Export"
expected_checks: The broader anchored 180-domain slice remains tractable under the deeper harness
Top-line retained adoption and benchmark median stay non-zero
The deeper 180 checkpoint is directly comparable against the medium 180 and deeper 90 checkpoints

guardrails: Do not change tranche selection or frontier conversion logic in this tranche
Do not treat the deeper 180 checkpoint as a full-frontier substitute
Use this checkpoint to compare breadth versus quality, not to auto-promote doctrine
